# Pock Community Documentation

This translated README was removed from active maintenance because it described the original Pock project and contained stale links.

Please use the current English community documentation:

- [README.md](../../README.md)
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [RELEASES.md](../../RELEASES.md)
- [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md)

Pock Community is an unofficial community-maintained fork of Pock, not the official Pock project.
